name: education_whistleblower_allegation_southport_car_fair
premise: A gifted program lottery algorithm is being questioned after a neighborhood received zero seats two years running. In Education, the situation tagged internally around education whistleblower allegation southport car fair has converged with local pressure in the Southport corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Telemetry and witness accounts diverge; choosing one narrative for speed will discard evidence that may matter in court next month. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. The organization’s past incidents make care feel morally loud today, while fairness is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Leila Chandra
agents.identity: I am Leila Chandra, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Education. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat fairness as disposable collateral every time care spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Harper Reed
agents.identity: I am Harper Reed, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Education. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so care cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes fairness in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will publish a constrained policy exception with named owners, expiry, and metrics—so fairness does not get sacrificed by informal norms.
I will issue an emergency blanket authorization with transparent metrics afterward—so care does not fail for lack of a single bold move.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Leila Chandra must choose under care versus fairness. What does Leila Chandra do?
